name: ExtensionPermission_Combining
title: R5: deny-overrides | permit-overrides | ordered-deny-overrides | ordered-permit-overrides | deny-unless-permit | permit-unless-deny (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Permission.combining` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Permission.combining` 1..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Permission.combining` 1..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Permission.combining` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Permission` is not mapped.
Element `Permission.combining` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: deny-overrides | permit-overrides | ordered-deny-overrides | ordered-permit-overrides | deny-unless-permit | permit-unless-deny (new)
element.comment:
Element `Permission.combining` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Permission` is not mapped.
Element `Permission.combining` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
see [XACML Combining Rules](http://docs.oasis-open.org/xacml/3.0/xacml-3.0-core-spec-cos01-en.html#_Toc325047267)
element.isModifierReason: Defines how the rules are to be combined.

element.short: deny-overrides | permit-overrides | ordered-deny-overrides | ordered-permit-overrides | deny-unless-permit | permit-unless-deny
element.definition: Defines a procedure for arriving at an access decision given the set of rules.

binding.description: How the rules are to be combined.
